1. Institution Overview & Establishment 
What is Siddartha Educational Academy Group of 
Institutions (SEAT)? 
Siddartha Educational Academy Group of Institutions (commonly called SEAT) is a private 
professional educational institution located in Tirupati, Andhra Pradesh, established to 
provide education primarily in: 
‚óè‚Äã Engineering 
‚óè‚Äã Technology 
‚óè‚Äã Management 
‚óè‚Äã Physical Education 
The institution mainly serves students from: 
‚óè‚Äã Andhra Pradesh 
‚óè‚Äã Telangana 
‚óè‚Äã Rayalaseema region 
‚óè‚Äã Nearby districts surrounding Tirupati 
The college aims to combine: 
1.‚Äã Academic education 
2.‚Äã Practical technical skills 
3.‚Äã Industry readiness 
4.‚Äã Professional ethics 
5.‚Äã Personality development 
Unlike institutions that focus only on classroom teaching, SEAT positions itself as a 
professional training-oriented college that attempts to improve employability through 
placements, training programs, technical chapters, and industry interaction.

Year of Establishment 
Established in: 2009 
This means the institution has been functioning for over 15 years, which gives it moderate 
institutional maturity compared to newer colleges.

6.1 Computer Science & Engineering 
(CSE)

What is CSE?

How software systems are built, how computers process information, and

‚óè‚Äã AI tools

‚óè‚Äã Banking software 
‚óè‚Äã E-commerce systems 
CSE teaches the engineering behind them.
